my_thoughts: Remaking RM_05. Building after unmaking. But what am I building with? The ontological_shift mechanism suggests structure, but structure for what? The student is defensive_fixation—do they need structure or do they need to see they're already structured?
accumulated_insight: T2: Student 'I am doing nothing else for the last 60 years.'—transitions seeking final method to defensive fixation. Teacher applies ontological shift with questions result fixation, redefines striving ontologically, asserts intrinsic value. Mid-episode in REMAKING phase, building toward resolution. Previous constraint collapse from T1 led to this shift.
visible_response:
What is wrong with striving?
Why look for results? Striving itself is your real nature.
